# `HelpOptions`

Options for customising help output.

- Import: `dreamcli`
- Export kind: interface
- Declared in: `src/core/help/index.ts`
- Source link: [`src/core/help/index.ts:24`](https://github.com/kjanat/dreamcli/blob/master/src/core/help/index.ts#L24)

## Signatures

```ts
interface HelpOptions {}
```

## Members

### Properties

#### `binName`

Binary/program name shown in the usage line. Defaults to command name.

```ts
binName?: string;
```

#### `isDefaultHelp`

Whether this usage line is being rendered as merged root/default help.

```ts
isDefaultHelp?: boolean;
```

#### `width`

Maximum line width (columns). Defaults to 80.

```ts
width?: number;
```
